query: SELECT id, actorId, name, aliases, type, origin, description, dataSource, confidence FROM threat_actors WHERE dataSource LIKE '%malpedia%' OR name REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR name REGEXP '^G[0-9]+$' OR name REGEXP '^TA[0-9]+$' OR description IS NULL OR description = '' ORDER BY name LIMIT 100
